title: pimelea decussata var. diosmifolia
intro: Pimelea decussata var. diosmifolia, also known as the Coastal Rice Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is a shrub native to eastern Australia, recognized for its white or pink flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Coastal Rice Flower can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
